paper.title_en: Enhanced Correlations in Hawking Radiation from Near-Extremal Collapse
paper.abstract_en: We consider the formation of a near-extremal Reissner-Nordstrom black hole by collapse, and show how to compute correlations in the outgoing Hawking radiation due to enhanced gravitational backreaction effects in the near-horizon region. This is done by reducing to the s-wave and employing the Hamiltonian formulation of Einstein-Maxwell theory coupled to a scalar field. Solving the constraints yields an action for the scalar field that incorporates gravitational backreaction effects at the quantum level, governed by an effective coupling g = G/(πr_0^3 T_H) that grows at low temperature, as in recent Schwarzian-based analyses. This action produces corrections to the free field Hawking state which are imprinted on correlation functions of the Hawking radiation measured at null infinity. As part of our analysis, we show that this action evaluated in the AdS_2 region is equivalent, at the level of all tree-level boundary correlators, to the standard JT/Schwarzian description coupled to dressed bilocal operators. We also reproduce some one-loop results. In our approach, metric fluctuations are included quantum mechanically through the reduced scalar action, rather than through a semiclassical expectation value, and our computation of the radiation manifestly reduces to Hawking's original treatment when metric fluctuations are neglected.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 该论文通过约化到s波并采用哈密顿形式，在量子层面纳入引力反冲效应，计算了近极端黑洞霍金辐射中的增强关联，并展示了与JT/Schwarzian描述在树图边关联子层面的等价性，具有较高的理论深度和新颖性。
decision.title_zh: 近极端坍缩中霍金辐射的增强关联
decision.abstract_zh: 我们考虑通过坍缩形成近极端Reissner-Nordstrom黑洞，并展示如何计算由于近视界区域增强的引力反冲效应导致的出射霍金辐射中的关联。这是通过约化到s波并采用耦合标量场的爱因斯坦-麦克斯韦理论的哈密顿形式实现的。求解约束得到标量场的有效作用，该作用在量子层面纳入了引力反冲效应，由在低温下增长的有效耦合g = G/(πr_0^3 T_H)控制，这与最近基于Schwarzian的分析一致。该作用产生对自由场霍金态的修正，这些修正印记在调零无穷远处测量的霍金辐射关联函数上。作为我们分析的一部分，我们证明在AdS_2区域评估的该作用，在树图边关联子层面上，等价于耦合了穿双局域算子的标准JT/Schwarzian描述。我们还重现了一些单圈结果。在我们的方法中，度规涨落通过约化标量作用在量子力学意义上被纳入，而不是通过半经典期望值，并且当我们忽略度规涨落时，我们的辐射计算明显退化为霍金的原始处理。
